implementation_summary: Added renameConversation and deleteConversation methods to useConversations hook, wired ConversationActionMenu to DrawerContent with long-press handling, implemented edge cases for deleting active and last conversations
acceptance_criteria_implemented: AC-1: Long-press conversation row opens ConversationActionMenu
AC-2: Rename updates Supabase and refreshes drawer list
AC-3: Empty rename input disables Save button
AC-4: Delete removes conversation and messages from Supabase
AC-5: Deleting active conversation navigates to next most recent
AC-6: Deleting last conversation creates new empty one
AC-7: API errors are thrown and can be caught by caller
AC-8: TypeScript types are correct (renameConversation, deleteConversation)
